t: Hollywood-Blockbuster Look — sweeping scale, polished color
Düster, hoher Kontrast, harte Schatten, 1940s feeling
Moderner Noir — Neon-Elemente, wet streets, urban dread
Enger Ausschnitt, Staub, Hitze — Leone / Morricone energy
Bedrohlich, dunkle Atmosphäre — tension without release
Warm, sanft, emotional — golden light, soft focus
Handheld, realistisch, roh — observational, no glamour
Futuristisch, klar, technisch — hard SF, precise design
Historisch, aufwändig, warm — Barry Lyndon candle light
Dynamisch, schnell, intensiv — kinetic energy, wide lenses
Ruhig, natürlich, alltäglich — Ozu stillness, mundane beauty
Vivid color, extreme close-ups, operatic violence — Argento
Jump cuts, natural light, cigarettes — Paris, 1960s
